mapper.insert: INSERT INTO password_recovery_verifications ( user_id, verification_type, channel, token_hash, expires_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{verificationType}, #{channel}, #{tokenHash}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT verification_id, user_id, verification_type, channel, token_hash, expires_at, consumed_at, status, attempt_count, created_at FROM password_recovery_verifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND verification_type = #{verificationType} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'VERIFIED') ORDER BY verification_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE password_recovery_verifications SET attempt_count = attempt_count + 1 WHERE verification_id = #{verificationId}
UPDATE password_recovery_verifications SET status = 'VERIFIED' WHERE verification_id = #{verificationId} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE password_recovery_verifications SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE verification_id = #{verificationId} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'VERIFIED')
